form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (34.51) in a OPEN, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth. Has two successes and six minors from 13 starts from box 1. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd on April 2 over 595m at this track behind Time To Fire beaten 2.5 lengths (34.47) in a OPEN. Although beaten ran one of the quickest times on the card last time. Follow up.

form.formComment: Strong performance showing plenty of speed to score by 2 lengths in a OPEN last start at this track, recording a handy 34.28 over the 595m journey. Expected to go close again if runs up to latest time.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (34.64) at this track in a OPEN, finishing fourth and beaten 3 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and two places from 10 starts. Others rate better this time.
